title: Prosthetist & Orthotist
description:
🌟 Join Our Team: Certified Prosthetist & Orthotist (Full-Time)


Location: Singapore

Company: The Prosthetic Company


Are you ready to make a meaningful impact in the lives of others while growing your career in a dynamic, patient-centered environment? The Prosthetic Company is seeking a Certified Prosthetist & Orthotist to join our talented team in Singapore. We’re committed to delivering the highest level of care and innovation in prosthetic and orthotic services—and we’re looking for someone who shares that passion.

🛠️ What You’ll Do

As a key member of our clinical team, you’ll work alongside experienced practitioners to design and deliver custom prosthetic and orthotic solutions. You’ll be supported through a structured competency pathway, gaining exposure to a wide range of amputation levels and clinical responsibilities.


Core Responsibilities:

  • Conduct patient evaluations and formulate treatment plans
  • Perform hand casting/scanning for all amputation levels and custom devices
  • Modify, fit, deliver, and follow up on prosthetic and orthotic devices
  • Support hospital and clinic staff with post-op evaluations and device delivery
  • Engage in outreach and marketing activities with referral sources and healthcare professionals
  • Educate patients and families on device use and care
  • Collaborate with physicians and therapists to optimize patient outcomes
  • Take on additional duties as assigned

🎓 What We’re Looking For

  • Certified Prosthetist/Orthotist, Certified Prosthetist, or Certified Orthotist
  • 2-5 years of experience preferred (but we welcome passionate early-career professionals too!)
  • Strong clinical skills, collaborative mindset, and commitment to patient care

🎁 What You’ll Enjoy

We believe in supporting our team both professionally and personally. Here’s what we offer:

  • Paid sick leave and vacation time
  • Outpatient medical/dental reimbursement
  • Internal and external training opportunities
  • Annual performance reviews
  • Company retreats and team-building events
  • Birthday celebrations
  • …and much more!

If you’re ready to join a company that values compassion, innovation, and excellence, we’d love to hear from you. Submit your resume today and take the next step in your prosthetics and orthotics career.

postedCompany.description:
The Prosthetic Company is a Social Enterprise that specialises in Prosthetics and Orthotics services in Singapore. Our mission is to inspire hope in the physically challenged.


With a one-stop centre of 3,000 square feet, we offer services ranging from consultation, transportation, prosthetics and orthotics fabrication including fitting and gait training.


We are a friendly and caring team working closely with orthopaedic surgeons, physiotherapists, related health personnel and caregivers ensuring a high level of professional and quality care second to none.
postedCompany.name: THE PROSTHETIC COMPANY PTE. LTD.
